description: This file contains SCSS tests for color mode mixins, including tests for data attribute selectors and media query implementations. It verifies the output CSS for dark mode styles under different configurations.

methods.name: describe
methods.description: Defines a test suite for a specific feature or behavior.

methods.name: it
methods.description: Defines an individual test case within a test suite.

methods.name: assert
methods.description: Sets up assertions for testing expected outputs.

methods.name: output
methods.description: Captures the generated CSS output for verification.

methods.name: expect
methods.description: Defines the expected CSS output or style rules.

methods.name: color-mode
methods.description: A mixin that generates styles for dark mode, either via data attributes or media queries.
